query: INSERT INTO users (openId, email, name, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) VALUES ('cornelia-medimagic', 'cornelia.griessel@medimagic.co.za', 'Cornelia Griessel', 'manus', 'admin', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin';
